title: Regolamenti dwar id-Drittijiet tal-Piżaturi tad-Dwana
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/35.9/mlt, expression eli/sl/35.9/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: 27 ta’ Marzu, 1981
provisions.content: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar idDrittijiet tal-Pi\aturi tad-Dwana.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
Bla ]sara g]ad-disposizzjonijiet l-o]ra ta’ dawn irregolamenti, d-drittijiet spe`ifikati fl-Ewwel Skeda g]andhom
jit]allsu lill-Kontrullur tad-Dwana g]as-servizzi ta’ u\in li jsiru
minn pi\aturi fid-Dipartiment tad-Dwana:

Drittijiet g]al
servizzi ta’ u\in.
Emendat:
A.L. 217 ta’ l1999;
A.L. 407 ta’ l2007.

I\da d-dritt li g]andu jit]allas dwar kull koll ta’ o[[etti li
jinti\en ma g]andu f’ebda ka\ ikun anqas minn \ew[ euro u tlieta u
tletin `ente\mu (2.33).

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
Meta s-servizzi ta’ l-u\in isiru barra mill-]inijiet normali
tax-xog]ol tad-Dipartiment g]andhom jit]allsu r-rati addizzjonali
stabbiliti bir-regolamenti 43 u 44 tar-Regolamenti tad-Dwana.

Servizzi wara l]inijiet tax-xog]ol.

provisions.title: Servizzi wara l]inijiet tax-xog]ol
provisions.content:
Id-dritt spe`ifikat fit-Tieni Skeda g]andu jit]allas dwar isservizz hemmhekk imsemmi.

Drittijiet g]al
servizzi o]ra.

provisions.title: servizzi o]ra
provisions.content:
L-ispejje\ tat-tra[itt mag]mula minn pi\aturi u ]addiema
tad-Dwana sabiex jag]tu xi servizz li dwaru g]andu jit]allas dritt
skond dawn ir-Regolamenti g]andhom ikunu dawk stabbiliti birregolamenti 43 u 44 tar-Regolamenti tad-Dwana, u g]andhom
jit]allsu lill-Kontrollur tad-Dwana mill-persuna li titlob dak isservizz.

Spejje\ ta’ tra[itt.

Emendata:
A.L. 39 ta’ l-1995.
Sostitwita:
A.L. 217 ta’ l1997;
A.L. 407 ta’ l2007.

(Regolament 2)
